markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Align on Relay's new content strategy and editorial plan.](https://fathom.video/share/Qd-bEyc1HSxTv8K3_kMJQf5LfzKjhdTC?tab=summary&timestamp=250.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**New Content Strategy:** The blog will restructure into 5 core SMB categories and a dedicated Home Services hub. This shift prioritizes domain authority (for LLMs) and vertical depth (for Google).](https://fathom.video/share/Qd-bEyc1HSxTv8K3_kMJQf5LfzKjhdTC?tab=summary&timestamp=405.0)
  - [**Home Services Hub:** To get faster signal, the hub will focus on deep, topic-based content (e.g., "HVAC accounting") that can be repurposed across verticals (e.g., HVAC, plumbing).](https://fathom.video/share/Qd-bEyc1HSxTv8K3_kMJQf5LfzKjhdTC?tab=summary&timestamp=942.0)
  - [**Attribution Gap:** Relay is struggling to connect AI visibility to conversions. GrowthX will provide access to its AI visibility tool to help bridge this gap.](https://fathom.video/share/Qd-bEyc1HSxTv8K3_kMJQf5LfzKjhdTC?tab=summary&timestamp=1482.0)
  - [**Quick Wins:** High-impact opportunities include refreshing legacy content (drives \~50 approvals/month), converting help center articles, and optimizing CTAs.](https://fathom.video/share/Qd-bEyc1HSxTv8K3_kMJQf5LfzKjhdTC?tab=summary&timestamp=1770.0)

## Topics

### The Attribution Gap

  - [**Problem:** Relay cannot definitively link content performance to conversions, despite seeing AI-driven approvals rise.](https://fathom.video/share/Qd-bEyc1HSxTv8K3_kMJQf5LfzKjhdTC?tab=summary&timestamp=1442.0)
  - [**Context:** Organic traffic is flat for the first time, making it critical to prove content ROI.](https://fathom.video/share/Qd-bEyc1HSxTv8K3_kMJQf5LfzKjhdTC?tab=summary&timestamp=1741.0)
  - [**Data Challenges:**](https://fathom.video/share/Qd-bEyc1HSxTv8K3_kMJQf5LfzKjhdTC?tab=summary&timestamp=1514.0)
      - [**Tool Discrepancy:** SEMrush and Ahrefs data often conflict.](https://fathom.video/share/Qd-bEyc1HSxTv8K3_kMJQf5LfzKjhdTC?tab=summary&timestamp=1514.0)
      - [**GA4 Reporting:** Relay can share conversion percentages but needs guidance on building reports that isolate content impact.](https://fathom.video/share/Qd-bEyc1HSxTv8K3_kMJQf5LfzKjhdTC?tab=summary&timestamp=1622.0)
  - [**Solution:** GrowthX will provide access to its AI visibility tool to help track prompts and citations.](https://fathom.video/share/Qd-bEyc1HSxTv8K3_kMJQf5LfzKjhdTC?tab=summary&timestamp=1590.0)

### New Content Strategy & Structure

  - [Relay is restructuring its blog to improve content organization and SEO performance.](https://fathom.video/share/Qd-bEyc1HSxTv8K3_kMJQf5LfzKjhdTC?tab=summary&timestamp=405.0)
  - [**New Structure:**](https://fathom.video/share/Qd-bEyc1HSxTv8K3_kMJQf5LfzKjhdTC?tab=summary&timestamp=405.0)
      - [**5 Core SMB Categories:**](https://fathom.video/share/Qd-bEyc1HSxTv8K3_kMJQf5LfzKjhdTC?tab=summary&timestamp=416.0)
          - [Cash Flow & Money Management](https://fathom.video/share/Qd-bEyc1HSxTv8K3_kMJQf5LfzKjhdTC?tab=summary&timestamp=455.0)
          - [Business Banking](https://fathom.video/share/Qd-bEyc1HSxTv8K3_kMJQf5LfzKjhdTC?tab=summary&timestamp=478.0)
          - [Starting & Running Your Business](https://fathom.video/share/Qd-bEyc1HSxTv8K3_kMJQf5LfzKjhdTC?tab=summary&timestamp=660.0)
          - [Taxes & Accounting](https://fathom.video/share/Qd-bEyc1HSxTv8K3_kMJQf5LfzKjhdTC?tab=summary&timestamp=440.0)
          - [Relay Features](https://fathom.video/share/Qd-bEyc1HSxTv8K3_kMJQf5LfzKjhdTC?tab=summary&timestamp=440.0)
      - [**Dedicated Hubs:** Home Services and AB (account-based marketing).](https://fathom.video/share/Qd-bEyc1HSxTv8K3_kMJQf5LfzKjhdTC?tab=summary&timestamp=415.0)
  - [**Rationale for "Starting & Running Your Business" Category:**](https://fathom.video/share/Qd-bEyc1HSxTv8K3_kMJQf5LfzKjhdTC?tab=summary&timestamp=660.0)
      - [**Goal:** Build domain authority for LLMs.](https://fathom.video/share/Qd-bEyc1HSxTv8K3_kMJQf5LfzKjhdTC?tab=summary&timestamp=701.0)
      - [**Method:** Publish foundational articles (e.g., "LLC vs. business license") to establish Relay as a trusted source.](https://fathom.video/share/Qd-bEyc1HSxTv8K3_kMJQf5LfzKjhdTC?tab=summary&timestamp=701.0)
      - [**Significance:** This is a strategic SEO play, not a shift to targeting early-stage businesses.](https://fathom.video/share/Qd-bEyc1HSxTv8K3_kMJQf5LfzKjhdTC?tab=summary&timestamp=660.0)

### Home Services Hub Strategy

  - [**Goal:** Get faster signal on content performance.](https://fathom.video/share/Qd-bEyc1HSxTv8K3_kMJQf5LfzKjhdTC?tab=summary&timestamp=870.0)
  - [**Decision:** Focus on vertical depth over breadth, aligning with recent Google algorithm updates.](https://fathom.video/share/Qd-bEyc1HSxTv8K3_kMJQf5LfzKjhdTC?tab=summary&timestamp=942.0)
  - [**Method:** Create deep, topic-based content (e.g., "HVAC accounting") that can be repurposed across different home services verticals (e.g., HVAC, plumbing).](https://fathom.video/share/Qd-bEyc1HSxTv8K3_kMJQf5LfzKjhdTC?tab=summary&timestamp=942.0)
  - [**Next Step:** Relay and GrowthX will research and define the initial sub-topics for this approach.](https://fathom.video/share/Qd-bEyc1HSxTv8K3_kMJQf5LfzKjhdTC?tab=summary&timestamp=1026.0)

### Editorial Plan & Quick Wins

  - [**Editorial Mix:** 2 Home Services articles + 3 core SMB articles per week.](https://fathom.video/share/Qd-bEyc1HSxTv8K3_kMJQf5LfzKjhdTC?tab=summary&timestamp=1067.0)
  - [**Budget Flexibility:** Relay asked if article volume can be increased incrementally (e.g., 2–3 articles/month) instead of in 5-article bundles. GrowthX will investigate.](https://fathom.video/share/Qd-bEyc1HSxTv8K3_kMJQf5LfzKjhdTC?tab=summary&timestamp=1098.0)
  - [**High-Impact Opportunities:**](https://fathom.video/share/Qd-bEyc1HSxTv8K3_kMJQf5LfzKjhdTC?tab=summary&timestamp=1770.0)
      - [**Refresh Legacy Content:** Update high-performing articles (driving \~50 approvals/month) to deepen context and improve internal linking.](https://fathom.video/share/Qd-bEyc1HSxTv8K3_kMJQf5LfzKjhdTC?tab=summary&timestamp=1770.0)
      - [**Convert Help Center Articles:** Transform high-traffic support content into blog posts to capture organic search traffic.](https://fathom.video/share/Qd-bEyc1HSxTv8K3_kMJQf5LfzKjhdTC?tab=summary&timestamp=1842.0)
      - [**Optimize CTAs:** Request recommendations from GrowthX on improving inline and sticky CTAs.](https://fathom.video/share/Qd-bEyc1HSxTv8K3_kMJQf5LfzKjhdTC?tab=summary&timestamp=1885.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**GrowthX:**](https://fathom.video/share/Qd-bEyc1HSxTv8K3_kMJQf5LfzKjhdTC?tab=summary&timestamp=1590.0)
      - [Record and share a Loom walkthrough of the AI visibility tool.](https://fathom.video/share/Qd-bEyc1HSxTv8K3_kMJQf5LfzKjhdTC?tab=summary&timestamp=1590.0)
      - [Onboard the Relay team to the AI visibility tool.](https://fathom.video/share/Qd-bEyc1HSxTv8K3_kMJQf5LfzKjhdTC?tab=summary&timestamp=1590.0)
      - [Research and propose initial sub-topics for the Home Services hub.](https://fathom.video/share/Qd-bEyc1HSxTv8K3_kMJQf5LfzKjhdTC?tab=summary&timestamp=1026.0)
      - [Investigate the feasibility and pricing of incremental article volume increases.](https://fathom.video/share/Qd-bEyc1HSxTv8K3_kMJQf5LfzKjhdTC?tab=summary&timestamp=1174.0)
      - [Provide recommendations for optimizing blog post CTAs.](https://fathom.video/share/Qd-bEyc1HSxTv8K3_kMJQf5LfzKjhdTC?tab=summary&timestamp=1885.0)
  - [**Relay:**](https://fathom.video/share/Qd-bEyc1HSxTv8K3_kMJQf5LfzKjhdTC?tab=summary&timestamp=1026.0)
      - [Research and propose initial sub-topics for the Home Services hub.](https://fathom.video/share/Qd-bEyc1HSxTv8K3_kMJQf5LfzKjhdTC?tab=summary&timestamp=1026.0)
      - [Share a list of high-converting legacy articles for potential refresh.](https://fathom.video/share/Qd-bEyc1HSxTv8K3_kMJQf5LfzKjhdTC?tab=summary&timestamp=1770.0)
      - [Provide GA4 reports on content performance and conversions, as guided by GrowthX.](https://fathom.video/share/Qd-bEyc1HSxTv8K3_kMJQf5LfzKjhdTC?tab=summary&timestamp=1622.0)
